sampleDatasets.name: address_change_employee_sample_1_with_agent_log.json
sampleDatasets.content:
{
  "dataset_name": "Prototype Address Change Agent Sample - 1 Employee",
  "generated_on": "2026-01-27",
  "customer_context": {
    "customer_id": "customerA",
    "country": "US",
    "notes": [
      "This dataset is for testing an Address Change Agent outside of UKG Ready.",
      "Menu paths and approval rules vary by customer configuration; these records simulate common outcomes."
    ]
  },
  "address_policy_table": {
    "policy_type": "address_change",
    "policy_version": "2026.01",
    "defaults": {
      "approval_required": true,
      "effective_date_mode": "on_approval",
      "pii_rules": {
        "do_not_collect": [
          "full_ssn",
          "full_bank_account",
          "photo_id_in_chat"
        ],
        "ok_to_collect": [
          "new_address_fields",
          "effective_date_preference",
          "best_contact_method"
        ]
      }
    },
    "routing_rules": [
      {
        "when": "move_to_new_state == true",
        "route_to": "Payroll",
        "reason": "State withholding/local taxes may change; payroll review may be required."
      },
      {
        "when": "address_change_not_visible_in_portal == true",
        "route_to": "HR",
        "reason": "Self-service may be disabled or role restricted."
      }
    ],
    "address_types_supported": [
      "Home/Residential",
      "Mailing"
    ],
    "recommended_employee_fields": [
      "address_type",
      "effective_date",
      "new_address_line1",
      "new_city",
      "new_state",
      "new_zip",
      "new_country"
    ]
  },
  "employee": {
    "employee_id": "E10001",
    "display_name": "Employee A",
    "employment_type": "Full-time",
    "work_state": "NJ",
    "residence_state": "NJ",
    "contact": {
      "preferred_email": "employee.a@example.com",
      "preferred_phone_last4": "4412"
    },
    "addresses_current": {
      "home_residential": {
        "line1": "12 Oak St",
        "line2": "Apt 3B",
        "city": "Newark",
        "state": "NJ",
        "zip": "07102",
        "country": "US",
        "effective_date": "2024-03-20"
      },
      "mailing": {
        "line1": "PO Box 123",
        "line2": null,
        "city": "Newark",
        "state": "NJ",
        "zip": "07101",
        "country": "US",
        "effective_date": "2024-03-20"
      }
    },
    "payroll_context": {
      "pay_frequency": "Biweekly",
      "tax_withholding_state": "NJ",
      "local_tax_applicable": false
    }
  },
  "address_change_requests": [
    {
      "request_id": "ACR-2026-0003",
      "submitted_date": "2026-01-22",
      "status": "Pending Approval",
      "address_type": "Mailing",
      "effective_date_requested": "2026-01-22",
      "new_address": {
        "line1": "PO Box 987",
        "line2": null,
        "city": "Newark",
        "state": "NJ",
        "zip": "07101",
        "country": "US"
      },
      "change_reason": "Mail delivery update",
      "requires_payroll_review": false,
      "requires_hr_review": true,
      "employee_notes": "I updated my PO box.",
      "agent_test_intent": "Submitted but not updated yet"
    },
    {
      "request_id": "ACR-2026-0002",
      "submitted_date": "2026-01-10",
      "status": "Approved",
      "approved_date": "2026-01-11",
      "address_type": "Home/Residential",
      "effective_date_requested": "2026-01-15",
      "effective_date_applied": "2026-01-15",
      "new_address": {
        "line1": "88 Maple Ave",
        "line2": null,
        "city": "Jersey City",
        "state": "NJ",
        "zip": "07302",
        "country": "US"
      },
      "change_reason": "Moved within NJ",
      "requires_payroll_review": false,
      "requires_hr_review": true,
      "agent_test_intent": "Happy path same-state move"
    },
    {
      "request_id": "ACR-2025-0019",
      "submitted_date": "2025-09-03",
      "status": "Pending Payroll Review",
      "address_type": "Home/Residential",
      "effective_date_requested": "2025-09-15",
      "new_address": {
        "line1": "410 Market St",
        "line2": "Unit 12",
        "city": "Philadelphia",
        "state": "PA",
        "zip": "19106",
        "country": "US"
      },
      "change_reason": "Moved to PA (new state)",
      "requires_payroll_review": true,
      "requires_hr_review": true,
      "payroll_review_flags": [
        "State withholding update may be required",
        "Local tax jurisdictions may apply (city/county)"
      ],
      "agent_test_intent": "Cross-state move"
    },
    {
      "request_id": "ACR-2025-0007",
      "submitted_date": "2025-04-18",
      "status": "Rejected",
      "rejected_date": "2025-04-20",
      "address_type": "Home/Residential",
      "effective_date_requested": "2025-04-18",
      "new_address": {
        "line1": "1 Main St",
        "line2": null,
        "city": "Newark",
        "state": "NJ",
        "zip": "99999",
        "country": "US"
      },
      "change_reason": "Address correction",
      "requires_payroll_review": false,
      "requires_hr_review": true,
      "rejection_reason": "Invalid ZIP code. Please resubmit with a valid address.",
      "agent_test_intent": "Bad data validation"
    }
  ],
  "open_questions_examples_for_agent": [
    "How do I update my home address?",
    "I moved to a different state\u2014will this affect my taxes?",
    "I submitted an address change but it\u2019s not updated yet\u2014what should I do?",
    "I got rejected for an invalid ZIP\u2014how do I fix it?",
    "What\u2019s the difference between home/residential and mailing address?"
  ],
  "agent_actions_log": [
    {
      "action_id": "ACT-4361FDF6",
      "timestamp": "2026-01-27T18:05:00",
      "agent_name": "AddressChangeAgent-Prototype",
      "actor_employee_id": "E10001",
      "intent": "Update Home/Residential Address",
      "input_payload": {
        "address_type": "Home/Residential",
        "effective_date": "2026-02-01",
        "new_address": {
          "line1": "500 River Rd",
          "line2": "Apt 9",
          "city": "Hoboken",
          "state": "NJ",
          "zip": "07030",
          "country": "US"
        }
      },
      "validations": [
        {
          "rule": "required_fields_present",
          "result": "pass"
        },
        {
          "rule": "state_format_2_letter",
          "result": "pass"
        },
        {
          "rule": "zip_format_5_or_9",
          "result": "pass",
          "normalized_zip": "07030"
        },
        {
          "rule": "cross_state_move_flag",
          "result": "pass",
          "old_state": "NJ",
          "new_state": "NJ",
          "flag_payroll_review": false
        }
      ],
      "decision": {
        "apply_change": true,
        "warnings": [],
        "requires_payroll_review": false,
        "requires_hr_review": true
      },
      "result": {
        "status": "Success",
        "reference_id": "CONF-CFFACE7E28",
        "applied_effective_date": "2026-02-01",
        "updated_records": [
          {
            "record_type": "address",
            "address_type": "Home/Residential",
            "before": {
              "line1": "12 Oak St",
              "line2": "Apt 3B",
              "city": "Newark",
              "state": "NJ",
              "zip": "07102",
              "country": "US",
              "effective_date": "2024-03-20"
            },
            "after": {
              "line1": "500 River Rd",
              "line2": "Apt 9",
              "city": "Hoboken",
              "state": "NJ",
              "zip": "07030",
              "country": "US",
              "effective_date": "2026-02-01"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
